core_mechanism: minimization of a free-energy / potential functional over two coupled order parameters (a Landau-type variational principle) to locate equilibrium states and trace phase boundaries as external control parameters are varied
brief_reason: The abstract states the two order parameters are obtained by minimizing the grand canonical thermodynamic potential and their behavior versus temperature and chemical potential yields the phase diagram, which is exactly a coupled-order-parameter free-energy minimization mapping out phase transitions.
